official_syllabus_reference.title: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus 2026-2027
official_syllabus_reference.used_for: P3 section names and syllabus-scope taxonomy review

policy.mapping_review_status_policy: Subpart mappings are machine candidates. Low-confidence mappings are never marked reviewed.
policy.whole_question_topic_mapping_rule: Whole-question topics are only supporting evidence; every mapping entry is keyed to a subpart_id.
policy.p1_p2_readiness_rule: P1/P2 records may support prerequisite skills, but counts_as_p3_readiness_evidence is false for every non-P3 mapping.
policy.content_lab_support_definition: A subpart is Content Lab supported when its source Asterion question has content_lab_generation_allowed=true; strong support also requires subpart review_status=ready.

prerequisite_skill_catalog.name: Coordinate geometry of lines and curves
Binomial expansion for positive integer powers
Basic integration and area under a curve
Modulus, polynomial division and partial-fraction prerequisites
Product, quotient, chain and parametric prerequisite techniques
Standard integrals, substitution and by-parts prerequisite techniques
Root bracketing and fixed-point iteration prerequisites

skills.name: Modulus equations and inequalities
skills.description: Solve equations and inequalities involving modulus expressions, including interval and graphical reasoning.

skills.name: Polynomial division, factors and remainders
skills.description: Use the factor theorem, remainder theorem and polynomial division to find constants, roots, factors or quotients.

skills.name: Partial fractions
skills.description: Decompose rational expressions into partial fractions for algebraic manipulation, integration and series expansion.
common_errors: Equating coefficients after an algebra slip

skills.name: Binomial expansion for rational powers
skills.description: Expand expressions with rational or negative powers, identify the validity range and use expansions for coefficients or estimates.
common_errors: Stopping before enough terms are available

skills.name: Logarithmic and exponential equations
skills.description: Use laws of logarithms and exponential functions, especially natural logarithms and e, to solve and transform equations.
common_errors: Taking logs outside the valid domain

skills.name: Linearising logarithmic relationships
skills.description: Transform power or exponential models to linear form and use gradient/intercept information to find constants.

skills.name: Reciprocal trigonometric functions
skills.description: Use secant, cosecant and cotangent definitions and identities in simplification, proof and equation solving.
common_errors: Treating sec x as inverse cosine

skills.name: Identities, compound angles and trigonometric equations
skills.description: Prove identities and solve equations using exact values, compound-angle formulae, double-angle formulae and interval control.
common_errors: Dividing by a possibly zero expression

skills.name: R sin(x plus alpha) and R cos(x plus alpha) form
skills.description: Express a sin x plus b cos x in a single-phase form and use it for equations or extrema.
common_errors: Choosing alpha in the wrong quadrant
Rounding R or alpha too early

skills.name: Derivative rules for P3 functions
skills.description: Differentiate powers, exponentials, logarithms and trigonometric functions using product, quotient and chain rules where needed.
common_errors: Using wrong signs for trigonometric derivatives

skills.name: Parametric and implicit differentiation
skills.description: Find gradients and derivatives for parametric or implicitly defined curves, including dy/dx from dx/dt and dy/dt.
common_errors: Treating y as constant in implicit differentiation

skills.name: Tangents, normals and stationary points
skills.description: Use derivatives to find tangents, normals, stationary points, maxima, minima and monotonicity information.
common_errors: Using tangent gradient for the normal
Failing to classify a stationary point

skills.name: Standard integration
skills.description: Integrate standard P3 power, exponential, logarithmic and trigonometric forms with constants and limits handled correctly.
common_errors: Using wrong signs for trigonometric antiderivatives

skills.name: Integration by substitution and by parts
skills.description: Use substitution and integration by parts, including changing limits and repeated by-parts where required.
common_errors: Losing the sign in the by-parts formula

skills.name: Trigonometric and partial-fraction integration
skills.description: Integrate trigonometric expressions and rational functions requiring identities or partial fractions.
common_errors: Forgetting scale factors in log terms
Applying trig identities with the wrong period

skills.name: Area and volume applications of integration
skills.description: Use definite integrals to find areas under or between curves and volumes of revolution in P3 contexts.

skills.name: Root location and uniqueness evidence
skills.description: Verify that a root lies in an interval using sign-change, monotonicity or supporting numerical evidence.
common_errors: Claiming uniqueness from sign change alone

skills.name: Fixed-point iteration
skills.description: Rearrange equations into iterative form and carry out iterations to a requested accuracy.
common_errors: Using rounded values as the next iteration

skills.name: Vector equations of lines and intersections
skills.description: Use vector equations of lines to find points, parameters, intersections and classify line relationships.
common_errors: Using the same parameter on two lines
Calling non-intersecting lines parallel without checking directions

skills.name: Scalar product, angles and perpendicularity
skills.description: Use the scalar product to find angles, projections, perpendicularity conditions and related vector geometry.
common_errors: Returning the obtuse angle when acute is requested

skills.name: Position vectors, distance and vector geometry
skills.description: Use position vectors, component form, magnitudes, unit vectors and distance constraints in two or three dimensions.
common_errors: Subtracting position vectors in the wrong order
Forgetting the square root in a magnitude
Using a non-unit vector as a unit vector

skills.name: Separable differential equations
skills.description: Solve first-order differential equations by separating variables and integrating both sides.
common_errors: Integrating with respect to the wrong variable

skills.name: Initial conditions and differential-equation models
skills.description: Use initial conditions to determine constants and interpret or sketch solutions in modelling contexts.
common_errors: Applying the initial condition before integration
Sketching behaviour inconsistent with the solution

skills.name: Complex arithmetic, modulus, argument and polar form
skills.description: Work with complex numbers in Cartesian and polar form, including arithmetic, modulus, argument and exact conversions.
common_errors: Putting the argument in the wrong quadrant
Rounding exact modulus or argument values

skills.name: Complex roots of equations and polynomials
skills.description: Solve equations with complex roots and use conjugate-pair structure for real-coefficient polynomials.

skills.name: Argand diagrams, loci and transformations
skills.description: Represent complex numbers geometrically and interpret equations or inequalities as loci, regions, rotations or translations.
common_errors: Plotting imaginary parts on the wrong axis
Drawing the wrong side of a locus boundary
